name: Twitcharr
description: A polished Twitch Live TV lineup for Dispatcharr. Add channels or discovery rules, then sync channels, streams and XMLTV guide data using anonymous Twitch metadata only. No OAuth, Client ID, Client Secret or Twitch sign-in required.
author: eliasbruno124

fields.label: Twitch channels and discovery
fields.placeholder:
gronkh, papaplatte, knossi
top:de:25
game:Just Chatting:10
search:knossi
fields.description: Enter Twitch names or URLs, separated by commas or line breaks. Discovery rules are supported: top, top:<lang>:<n>, game:<category>:<n>, search:<text>:<n>.

fields.label: Channel group
fields.description: Channel group used for all Twitcharr-managed channels in Dispatcharr.

fields.label: Starting channel number
fields.description: First channel number used for new Twitcharr channels. Existing Twitcharr channel numbers are kept stable when possible.

fields.label: Stream quality
fields.description: Adaptive chooses the best stream variant your connection can sustain. Fixed values are passed directly to Streamlink.

fields.label: Connection bandwidth (Mbps)
fields.description: Used by adaptive quality. Set to 0 to use the last measured value or a conservative fallback.

fields.label: Bandwidth safety margin (%)
fields.description: Extra headroom above Twitch's advertised bitrate. Higher is safer; lower can allow sharper quality.

fields.label: Fastest possible startup
fields.description: Uses more aggressive Streamlink startup settings for faster channel switching.

fields.label: Show offline channels
fields.description: Keep offline streamers in the lineup. When disabled, offline channels are removed and recreated when they go live.

fields.label: EPG refresh interval (minutes)
fields.description: How often Twitcharr refreshes live status, guide data and icons. Minimum: 1 minute.

fields.label: ttv.lol proxy servers
fields.description: Comma-separated ttv.lol proxy playlist URLs passed to Streamlink. Leave empty to disable proxy playback.

fields.label: Emby / Jellyfin URL
fields.description: Optional Emby or Jellyfin base URL. Twitcharr triggers Refresh Guide after each EPG update.

fields.label: Emby / Jellyfin API key
fields.description: Required when an Emby or Jellyfin URL is set. This is your media-server API key, not a Twitch token.

fields.label: Data directory
fields.description: Folder used for twitch.xmltv, scheduler state and the cached ttv.lol Streamlink plugin.

actions.label: Sync now
actions.description: Runs the complete refresh flow: update ttv.lol if needed, refresh Twitch data, write the guide, sync channels and refresh the media server.

actions.label: Refresh guide
actions.description: Refreshes Twitch live status, writes XMLTV guide data and updates Dispatcharr EPG rows before refreshing clients.

actions.label: Sync channels
actions.description: Writes the current guide, creates or updates channels, links them to fresh EPG rows immediately and refreshes the media server.

actions.label: Full refresh
actions.description: Runs the ttv.lol check, refreshes Twitch metadata, writes the guide, syncs channels and refreshes the media server in one pass.

actions.label: Measure bandwidth
actions.description: Measures available bandwidth, saves the Mbps value and updates the adaptive Streamlink profile.

actions.label: Test proxies
actions.description: Tests each configured ttv.lol proxy server and reports reachability, HTTP status, latency and the suggested cleanup result.

actions.label: Refresh Emby / Jellyfin
actions.description: Triggers Refresh Guide on the configured Emby or Jellyfin server so channel and EPG changes appear there after sync.

actions.label: Update ttv.lol
actions.description: Checks for a new ttv.lol Streamlink plugin release and downloads it when an update is available for playback.

actions.label: Uninstall
actions.description: Removes the managed StreamProfile, EPG source, channels and streams, then refreshes Emby/Jellyfin once if configured.

confirm.title: Remove all managed objects?
confirm.message: Deletes the Twitch StreamProfile, EPG source and every channel or stream created by Twitcharr. The plugin and its settings stay in place. Emby/Jellyfin Refresh Guide is triggered afterwards if configured.
